text: Morning Jarvis. Can you give me a quick briefing for Saturday?
title: Morning Greeting

text: Morning Mike! Today is Saturday, August 17. No work meetings today. You have neighborhood BBQ at Dave's place and Sarah wanting to work on her design course.
title: Jarvis Morning Briefing

text: Jarvis, Got hyperfocused on my workstation coding. Wrote a vector search indexing script in Go. My ADHD hyperfocus really kicked in.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Your hyperfocus projects are impressive. Go vector search tools are speedy. Let me know if you want validation runs. I'll monitor the API alerts.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Quick log: We went to the Frisco Aquatic Center today. Ethan is nervous about the soccer tournament in Plano. The kids are staying active.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Got it, Mike. Great progress. Reassure him that practice is paying off. I've sent the game schedule to Sarah. I'll track the schedule.
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Planning a street block party soon. My golf driving was terrible but had a great catch-up. We need to do this more often.
title: Social Update

text: Understood. Catan is always a good time. Jake is a great friend. Did you discuss the Naperville trip? Have a great time!
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: The smart-home hub is acting up today. The garbage disposal is jammed with a cherry pit. It is running much better now.
title: Household Update

text: Sure thing! Let's get that resolved. Safety first: turn off power under the sink, then use the hex wrench. The automations are running now.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Sarah is planning a playdate for Ethan. She had a massive tantrum about brushing her teeth. We need to stay consistent with them.
title: Parenting Update

text: Sure thing! Screen time is always a negotiation. Tantrums are tough at age 3. Turning brushing into a game or song might help. Parenting is definitely a journey.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Quick update: Prepping school lunches for the week. We need a quick dinner that the kids will actually eat. Want to keep meals simple and healthy.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Meal planning saves so much time. How about taco night? It's fast, and you have beef and shells ready. Let me know how the recipe turns out.
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Jarvis, Enjoying a cold beer on the deck. The weather tonight in Frisco is perfect. Ready to relax for the weekend.
title: Personal Update

text: Sure thing! Relaxation mode active. You've earned it! Friday deck relaxation is the best way to spend the evening. I'll silence any notification logs.
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Jarvis, Researching rover power systems in depth. Spectrometry data for K2-18b is fascinating. My ADHD hyperfocus really kicked in.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Logged that. I've indexed the research notes. K2-18b atmospheric profiles are a milestone. I'll fetch companion papers. I've saved your custom configurations.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Just wanted to mention that ethan is practicing his piano lessons in the living room. Ethan is nervous about the soccer tournament in Plano. It's great to see them having fun.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Busy day for sports! Reassure him that practice is paying off. I've sent the game schedule to Sarah. He's doing great with Mrs. Patterson.
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Quick log: Played golf with Jake Morrison today. We are meeting Dave and Kim at a new restaurant. Always a fun neighborhood crowd.
title: Social Update

text: Neighborhood connections are fun. Enjoy! I've set reservation alerts and mapped the route to Plano. Let me know if you need any printouts.
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Quick update: The kitchen sink area has a problem. We are planning a garage clean-up day this weekend. Always something to fix.
title: Household Update

text: Sure thing! Automations are great when they work. I'll add heavy-duty storage bins to the Costco list to help organize. I'll update the home maintenance log.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Jarvis, Bedtime went very smoothly tonight. Lily fell asleep immediately holding her stuffed elephant. They keep us on our toes.
title: Parenting Update

text: Got it, Mike. Screen time is always a negotiation. A calm routine makes all the difference. Nice contrast to the tantrums. Rest well tonight.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Just wanted to mention that sarah found a new recipe to try. Grilling steaks and chicken on the deck tonight. The kids are always hungry.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Interesting. Meal planning saves so much time. Perfect grilling weather! I've added hickory chips to the Costco list. I've updated the shared shopping list.
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Just wanted to mention that enjoying a cold beer on the deck. The weather tonight in Frisco is perfect. Ready to relax for the weekend.
title: Personal Update

text: Logged that. Good way to wrap up the day. You've earned it! Friday deck relaxation is the best way to spend the evening. Let me know if you need anything else.
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Jarvis, logging today's journal. Pretty relaxing weekend day. Managed to handle bedtime without too much screaming. Managed to handle bedtime without too much screaming. Ready for sleep.
title: Evening Journal Entry

text: Journal summary recorded. Have a peaceful night.
title: Jarvis Journal Summary
